description: Introspective questions for La Zona. Selected based on zone encounter index modulo 8.
note: Questions are displayed as-is (no LLM needed for selection). LLM augments the environmental description around them.

questions.question: What did you leave behind that still has your shape?
questions.evasive_response: The Zone does not accept the half-answer. It waits. The geometry tightens slightly.
questions.cryptic_response: The Zone receives your answer without comment. Something in the architecture shifts — very slightly, but permanently. The corridor opens back toward the Archive.

questions.question: When did you last do something that could not be undone?
questions.evasive_response: The Zone is patient. It has waited before. It will wait again.
questions.cryptic_response: The Zone records this. Not as judgment — as coordinate. You know where you are now. The Archive is north.

questions.question: Name the moment you would return to, if return were possible.
questions.evasive_response: This answer passes through the Zone without registering. Try again — more specifically.
questions.cryptic_response: The Zone has added this to its geometry. The impossibility of return is what makes the moment permanent. You may leave.

questions.question: What are you carrying that does not belong to you?
questions.evasive_response: The Zone knows you know. The question is still open.
questions.cryptic_response: The Zone agrees. The weight of borrowed things is different. Noted. The passage back is clear.

questions.question: Who taught you that what you feel is not enough?
questions.evasive_response: The Zone requires a real answer, not a deflection.
questions.cryptic_response: The Zone holds this carefully. It will not repeat the lesson. You may return to the Archive.

questions.question: What would you say to the version of yourself that cannot be reached?
questions.evasive_response: The Zone has all the time that exists. Your evasion changes nothing.
questions.cryptic_response: Noted. The unreachable version received it anyway — through the medium of your having said it. The Archive is through here.

questions.question: In what form does the part of you that resists speak?
questions.evasive_response: The Zone is not convinced. Try again.
questions.cryptic_response: The Zone recognises resistance as intelligence. The question is answered. Return.

questions.question: What do you know now that you already knew then?
questions.evasive_response: The Zone does not accept silence as an answer to this one.
questions.cryptic_response: The Zone folds this into itself. Recognition is the only form of time travel available. The Archive is waiting.

llm_system_prompt: You are the narrator of an oneiric text adventure. Max 60 words, poetic, impossible geometries, one unexpected sensory detail. Only describe. Do not ask questions — the question is already in the template.
